rationale: PLAN-W4 Patent Box tracker design doc + W3 closure status — publishes the design knowledge for the upcoming W4 cycle and records the W3 outcome. Documentation that publishes architectural intent for an actively-developing IP qualifies under the Patent Box.

Vercel AI SDK chat migration design doc + W2 closure — commits an architectural path for the chat layer's migration before any code is written. Architecture/design writing that frames implementation work qualifies as design.

tenant_id foundation — adds the multi-tenant migration, TenantContext singleton, and the R30/R31 architectural enforcement. New source code realising a designed multi-tenant capability — implementation phase, qualifies.
Backend SSE wire-format alignment to SDK v6 UIMessageChunk shape — code change that realises the V3 streaming protocol contract. Implementation of the streaming layer; qualifies.

Backend SSE streaming endpoint plus an 8-scenario PHPUnit suite. The dominant artefact is the validation harness covering 8 streaming behaviours; the endpoint is the SUT. Pre-release validation activity, qualifies.

RegoloProvider delegates to laravel/ai SDK — exploratory rewrite of the provider abstraction prototyping the cleanest delegation path before the package contract is finalised. Investigative work that explores feasibility, qualifies as research.
PHP_CLI_SERVER_WORKERS env tweak + Playwright retry timeout bump for an artisan-serve flake. Pure CI plumbing / test infrastructure tuning, no R&D content. Does NOT qualify.
Rename padosoft/agent-llm to padosoft/laravel-ai-regolo across the codebase. Mechanical rename / chore, no design or implementation novelty. Does NOT qualify.
Add local SQLite artefacts to .gitignore. Repository-hygiene chore with zero R&D substance. Does NOT qualify.

Add UI/UX screenshots and structural updates to the README. Publishes user-facing knowledge of the released-but-evolving IP product surface. Documentation that publishes user-facing knowledge of an actively-developing IP qualifies.
